//: Scoped typecheck for the box's tsx entrypoints. The main tsconfig excludes scripts/, so scripts/builder-worker.ts (the systemd entrypoint that runs every autonomous lane) is NEVER typechecked. That gap shipped June's dropped-inputs bug (PR #1971). This config extends the main tsconfig, drops the scripts/ exclusion, and includes exactly the box entrypoints — the same set _check-box-parses.ts parse-gates. Wired into predeploy via `npm run check:box-types`. Keep `include` byte-identical to BOX_ENTRYPOINTS in scripts/_check-box-parses.ts — scripts/_check-box-entrypoints-in-sync.ts (Phase 2) enforces this.
